subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the Fragrances of God! Verily, I read thy interesting letter, understood from it an excellent meaning and pray to God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی قرئت تحریرک البدیع و ادرکت منه معنی بلیغ و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
